author: songkg7
description: Convert Obsidian Markdown syntax to other Markdown platforms such as Jekyll.

manifest.author: haril song
manifest.description: This is a plugin to make obsidian markdown syntax compatible with other markdown syntax.
manifest.name: O2

name: O2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at 2.4.1 -->

## What's Changed
### 🏕 Features
* refactor: Improve FrontMatterConverter with functional programming principles by @songkg7 in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/429
* refactor: Apply functional programming patterns and architecture re-design by @songkg7 in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/430
* feat: Improve settings persistence across plugin updates
* feat: Set default dateExtractionPattern to FOLDER_NAMED_BY_DATE

### 👒 Dependencies
* chore(deps-dev): bump typescript from 5.7.2 to 5.7.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/422
* chore(deps-dev): bump eslint from 9.17.0 to 9.19.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/421
* chore(deps-dev): bump the dev-dependencies group with 3 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/420
* chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.24.2 to 0.25.0 in the npm_and_yarn group by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/423
* chore(deps-dev): bump the dev-dependencies group with 3 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/424
* chore(deps-dev): bump eslint-plugin-yml from 1.16.0 to 1.17.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/427
* chore(deps-dev): bump ts-jest from 29.2.5 to 29.2.6 by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/426
* chore(deps-dev): bump obsidian from 1.7.2 to 1.8.7 by @dependabot in https://github.com/songkg7/o2/pull/425


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/songkg7/o2/compare/2.3.1...2.4.1
